profile.about_me_content: I'm an IT engineer specializing in cloud architecture, cybersecurity, and AI/ML applications. With experience across the full development lifecycle, I build robust, scalable solutions that solve complex problems.
profile.interests: When not coding, I enjoy exploring emerging technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and writing about tech trends. I'm particularly interested in the intersection of AI ethics, privacy, and security.
profile.heading: About Me
profile.content: I'm an IT engineer specializing in cloud architecture, cybersecurity, and AI/ML applications. When not coding, I enjoy exploring emerging technologies and writing about tech trends.
